name: La Sorted
teaser: Lots of care, but the crust-to-toppings ratio could use work. Good bread, but probably too much of it.
review: Lots of care goes into this pie, but I think the pizza could use a better crust to toppings ratio. It's a real problem with 10" pies in general. It's good bread no doubt, but there's probably too much of it for me to feel fully satisfied.
headsUp: A newer addition to the LA slice scene with serious promise.
update: Getting better with every visit. Watch this one.
address: 984 N Broadway, Los Angeles, CA 90012, USA
hours: Monday: 11:00 AM – 10:00 PM · Tuesday: 11:00 AM – 10:00 PM · Wednesday: 11:00 AM – 10:00 PM · Thursday: 11:00 AM – 10:00 PM · Friday: 11:00 AM – 1:00 AM · Saturday: 11:00 AM – 1:00 AM · Sunday: 10:00 AM – 10:00 PM
